message:
Clarify that dev dependency versions are examples

Add note that versions should not be copied verbatim and users should
always use the latest from PyPI. Update example versions to current
latest releases.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,14 +2,17 @@
 
 Standard dev dependencies for Tenzir Python projects.
 
+> **Note**: The versions below are examples. Always use the latest available
+> versions from PyPI rather than copying these verbatim.
+
 ```toml
 [dependency-groups]
 dev = [
-  "pytest>=8.3.0",
-  "pytest-cov>=5.0.0",
-  "mypy>=1.11.0",
-  "ruff>=0.7.0",
-  "coverage[toml]>=7.6.0",
+  "pytest>=9.0",
+  "pytest-cov>=7.0",
+  "mypy>=1.19",
+  "ruff>=0.14",
+  "coverage[toml]>=7.12",
 ]
 ```
